_publications._publicationTitle: Basement membrane proteins in extracellular matrix characterize NF1 neurofibroma development and response to MEK inhibitor.

_contextSnippet: 729 of 1,291 targets were decreased in the MEKi-treated group compared with vehicle. One hundred ninety targets were consistently decreased in all 3 MEKi-treated samples
details: 729 of 1,291 targets were decreased in the MEKi-treated group compared with vehicle, with 190 targets consistently decreased in all 3 MEKi-treated samples
